He favors Sunrisers Hyderabad over Delhi Capitals, citing a batting concern.

description: KL Rahul is on the cusp of a significant IPL milestone, needing just 50 runs against Sunrisers Hyderabad to surpass MS Dhoni as the sixth-highest run-scorer. Rahul's aggressive batting this season, marked by a strike rate near 170, has seen him amass 168 runs so far. He has already outscored Dhoni in keeper-specific 50+ scores.

description: 'Bhooth Bangla' Day 5 box office tracking shows the Akshay Kumar and Priyadarshan film crossing the Rs. 100 crore mark globally. Despite a 70% drop on its first Monday, the horror-comedy remains a topic of discussion for its nostalgic cast including Paresh Rawal and Rajpal Yadav. As of April 21, 2026, the domestic net collection stands at Rs. 65.46 crore.

Fortuner at gate, gunshots at 2am: How a parking feud turned fatal in Delhi's Preet Vihar
description: A parking dispute over a Fortuner tragically escalated into murder in East Delhi's Preet Vihar early Monday. Pankaj Nayyar, 34, was shot dead outside his family home by a tenant neighbour, Gaurav Sharma, after an argument over vehicle placement. Sharma, along with two accomplices, allegedly attacked Pankaj and his brother before fleeing.

title: 'Never been more ...':Tim Cook in memo to employees on his exit as Apple CEO
description: Apple CEO Tim Cook announced his transition to executive chairman later this year, after a 15-year tenure. He expressed confidence in Apple's future and its core values, praising the team's dedication. John Ternus, SVP of hardware engineering, will succeed Cook as CEO, with Cook pledging to support the smooth transition.

title: ‘India does not forget’: Army's strong message on Pahalgam terror attack anniversary
description: A year after the Pahalgam terror attack, India reaffirms its resolve with Operation Sindoor, a decisive response against cross-border terrorism. The operation saw Indian forces strike terror bases in Pakistan, eliminating over 100 terrorists and destroying launchpads. This reinforced India's zero-tolerance stance against state-sponsored terrorism.

title: Amazon files lawsuit after losing millions in fake laptop and GPU refunds
description: A sophisticated refund scam has cost Amazon $4 million in stolen goods like graphics cards and laptops. A group named RBK allegedly exploited customer support by claiming packages never arrived, even using fake police reports. Amazon uncovered the scheme through an undercover investigator, leading to a lawsuit against named individuals and unknown accomplices.

title: London nightclub clash: Klaudia Zakrzewska hit by Gabrielle Carrington
description: Klaudia Zakrzewska, known as Klaudia Glam, is in critical condition after being hit by a car outside a London nightclub. Video shows a fight with Gabrielle Carrington before the crash. Carrington has been arrested, police confirmed. Two others were injured. Authorities are asking witnesses to come forward as the investigation continues.
